title: Culinare C10015 MagiCan Tin Opener | White | Plastic/Stainless Steel | Manual Can Opener | Comfortable Handle for Safety and Ease | Heavy Duty Stainless Steel Cutting Wheel
features: The simple design of the Culinare MagiCan Opener combines a robust handle with maximum comfort and a safe, sturdy grip for a tin opener that works efficiently and is easy to use
Featuring a powerful stainless steel cutting wheel, this opener cuts cans of all sizes, is lightweight and simple to turn, and securely clips to the top of the lid for safe removal and clean hands
To use, simply secure on top of the lid and turn the handle; the cutting wheel cuts around, not into the can so no sharp edges are left behind, while the lid stays attached until you open the handles
The clean slicing motion of this manual opener makes it a wonderful addition to your kitchen gear, as an effective tool for opening vegetables, beans, soups, and other favourite canned foods
Items delivered: 1 x Culinare MagiCan Opener with a heavy duty stainless steel cutting wheel and a wide comfortable handle for maximum precision and ease, in white
description: From the manufacturer Culinare was established over 30 years ago with the launch of the original iconic 'Magican' a product that has since sold over 18 million units worldwide. Culinare now offers a designed range of essential kitchen gadgets and tools at affordable prices, making the task of food preparation easier, safer and quicker. MagiCan Opener Effective yet simple to use The simple design of the Culinare MagiCan Opener combines a robust handle with maximum comfort and a safe, sturdy grip for a tin opener that works and is easy to use With more than 18 million sold worldwide the Culinare MagiCan is a firm favourite. If you want a can opener that is effective yet simple to use, the MagiCan is the obvious choice. Stainless steel cutting wheel Opens cans of all sizes Easy-opening Safe hands-free lid disposal Robust handles with a safe, sturdy grip Wipe with a damp cloth to clean Stainless Steel Cutting Wheel Powerful stainless steel cutting wheel opens cans of all sizes. Easy Opening Clips to top of lid for easy-opening. Once opened, the lid stays attached to opener to prevent it from falling into food. Safe Lid Disposal Lid-release handles allow for safe disposal of lids and keep hands clean. Robust Handles The robust handles are designed for maximum comfort and a safe, sturdy grip. The Magican is designed so it can be used by left or right handed users.
